nasb.text: For the good that I want, I do not do, but I practice the very evil that I do not want.

esv.text: For I do not do the good I want, but the evil I do not want is what I keep on doing.

cnv.text: 所以我願意行的善，我沒有去行；我不願意作的惡，我倒去作了。

ccb.text: 我想行善，却不能行；我不想作恶，反倒去作。

csbs.text: 这样，我愿意行的善，我没有去行；我不愿意做的恶，我反而去做。
